subcodes.first_line: Today is the sacred symbol of the mysteries of the love of God that lie hidden in the essence of hearts, and its fire is enkindled within them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اليوم رمز مصون اسرار محبّت اللّه است که در هويّت قلوب مستور است و نارش در قلوب موقود
subcodes.subjects: @pain of love; love as veil, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @love of God, @spiritual transformation
